hero.slogan1: 我们致力于创造品质，创造快乐

about.p1: Founded in 2013, Hummingbird Interactive is an innovative technology company dedicated to empowering industries through digital intelligence.
about.p2: We redefine industry efficiency with AI, unlock the value of digital twins, reinvent cultural and tourism experiences, and create new forms of offline entertainment through Mixed Reality.
about.p3: Across every industry scenario—whether enterprise decision-making, real-world operations, or consumer experiences
about.p4: we are committed to delivering a smarter, more immersive, and value-driven digital future for our clients.

cases.c1_desc: Built on an enterprise-grade AI infrastructure, we develop intelligent agents, scenario-driven robotics, and personalized education solutions—redefining efficiency across industries.
cases.c2_desc: Powered by digital twin technology, we enable industrial simulation, emergency management, and smart city solutions—bridging the physical and digital worlds to unlock new operational value.
cases.c3_desc: We redefine cultural and tourism experiences through technology—bridging digital content with immersive offline environments to bring culture to life and elevate the joy of travel.
cases.c4_desc: By integrating Mixed Reality (MR) with pop culture IP, we create a new entertainment ecosystem that combines immersive gameplay, light physical activity, and social interaction—unlocking next-generation offline experiences.

partners.title: Partners
partners.desc: We have established long-term strategic partnerships with leading global enterprises.

ai_page.hero_desc: Full-stack proprietary technology · Multimodal integration · Low-code development · Deep industry expertise · Secure and controllable architecture
ai_page.intro_p1: Built on full-stack AI capabilities, we deliver an enterprise-grade AI infrastructure spanning computing power, algorithms, and data.
ai_page.intro_p2: Powered by proprietary foundation models and a modular architecture, we deliver highly customizable, rapidly deployable intelligent solutions across industries.
ai_page.intro_p3: We bring AI from the lab into real-world production—transforming it into a core engine for business growth.
ai_page.case1_desc: Eliminate manual data processing and fragmented analysis. Reduce decision-making cycles from days to hours—enabling precise, data-driven strategies with speed and confidence.
ai_page.case1_l1: Automated multi-source data collection and integration
ai_page.case1_l2: Intelligent semantic analysis and trend forecasting
ai_page.feature1_desc:
With deep understanding of business logic, AI Agents integrate complex, multi-source data in real time.
From market insights to operational optimization, from risk alerts to strategic simulation, they deliver end-to-end support—from data and analysis to actionable insights and recommendations—for enterprise decision-makers.
ai_page.case2_desc: We transform financial service workflows through intelligent automation—enhancing responsiveness, improving customer experience, reducing operational costs, and strengthening risk control for sustainable growth.
ai_page.case2_l3: Enhanced risk control and approval efficiency
ai_page.feature2_desc:
An intelligent service ecosystem integrating speech recognition, intent understanding, and financial knowledge graphs.
It supports key scenarios such as customer service, credit risk control, and wealth management—delivering personalized services while ensuring real-time security for accounts and transactions.
ai_page.case3_desc: Leveraging AI to adapt to each child’s developmental needs, we foster learning interest through engaging interactions—reducing the burden on parents, enhancing educational quality, and building a strong foundation for lifelong growth.
ai_page.feature3_desc:
Built on cognitive science and developmental psychology, we create immersive learning experiences through multimodal interaction.
Content such as picture books, music, and educational games is dynamically recommended based on each child’s interests and abilities—enabling truly personalized learning while generating real-time growth insights for parents and educators.
ai_page.eco_title: Building an AI Ecosystem: Intelligence Everywhere
ai_page.eco_desc: From foundational AI infrastructure to real-world applications, we collaborate with partners to build tailored AI solutions and shape the future of intelligent industries.

digital_page.hero_title:
Converging the Physical and Digital
Digital Twins Power Industry Transformation
digital_page.hero_desc:
Through advanced digital twin solutions, we create fully synchronized virtual replicas of physical assets
enabling intelligent transformation from real-time sensing and analysis to simulation-driven decision-making.
digital_page.intro_p1: When physical entities meet digital mirrors, when industrial operations integrate with real-time simulation
digital_page.intro_p2: With 'Data + Industry' as the core, we build a full-link digital twin system
digital_page.intro_p3: Relying on high-precision reproduction and dynamic data driven, creating a 1:1 precise mapping digital base
digital_page.intro_p4: Shifting industries from 'passive response' to 'active prediction', realizing smart upgrading
digital_page.m1_desc: Multi-physics coupling algorithm / High-precision 3D reconstruction / Millimeter-level precision replication
digital_page.m2_desc: Digital simulation engine / Predictive analytics and early warning capabilities
digital_page.m3_desc: Receive the latest data in milliseconds and trigger business logic operations immediately
digital_page.cat_ind_desc: Leveraging digital twin models to simulate, predict, and optimize the entire lifecycle of industrial production systems.
digital_page.case_ind_1_desc: A fully interactive 3D digital twin of a port environment, including docks, transport terminals, and operational facilities.The platform enables virtual training and simulation of port scheduling and logistics operations, helping users understand complex dispatch workflows and improve operational efficiency.
digital_page.case_ind_2_title: Poly Abu Dhabi Military Exhibition Visual System
digital_page.case_ind_2_desc: An interactive visualization system developed for an international defense exhibition, showcasing advanced military technologies through digital displays, video demonstrations, and immersive experiences—enhancing global communication and engagement.
digital_page.case_ind_3_title: Military Museum Liaoning Ship VR Display Platform
digital_page.case_ind_3_desc: A full-scale digital reconstruction of the aircraft carrier Liaoning, offering an immersive VR experience from a first-person perspective.Users can explore carrier operations, including fleet formations, aircraft landing and takeoff procedures, deck operations, and hangar management.
digital_page.case_ind_4_desc: A high-precision CNC machining simulation system that replicates automated assembly processes, enabling operators to train in virtual environments, improve efficiency, reduce errors, and optimize workflows.
digital_page.case_ind_5_desc: A set of visual guidance systems for flexible line assembly, integrating quality data collection.
digital_page.cat_emg_desc: Full-cycle management and technical practice for emergency and public safety scenarios
digital_page.case_emg_1_title: Global Earthquake Disaster Geological Drill System
digital_page.case_emg_1_desc: Simulating various earthquake disaster scenarios and geological changes to provide a realistic drill environment.
digital_page.case_emg_2_title: Guangzhou Safety and Emergency Education System
digital_page.case_emg_2_desc: Targeting disaster scenes, realizing emergency safety education through content display and process demonstration.
digital_page.cat_city_desc: Embedding digital infrastructure into urban systems to enable real-time city awareness, intelligent resource coordination, and proactive public services.
digital_page.case_city_1_title: Water Conservancy Institute Digital Twin Platform
digital_page.case_city_1_desc: Displaying and analyzing the joint dispatching of water conservancy projects. Processing BIM model data.
digital_page.case_city_2_desc: Building a digital twin of the virtual network to map and monitor actual network operation status in real-time.
digital_page.case_city_3_title: Tiantongyuan Smart Community Comprehensive Management Platform
digital_page.case_city_3_desc: The Tiantongyuan smart community system platform includes property management software, smart community applications, smart park applications, community management systems, owner management systems, parking lot systems, energy consumption management systems, smart inspection systems, smart access control and lighting, and cloud call centers. With advanced technology and user-friendly design, it provides strong support for creating a comfortable, safe, and intelligent community environment.
digital_page.cta_desc: Partner with us to build high-precision, high-value digital twin solutions.

tourism_page.hero_desc: We empower cultural and tourism assets through digital technologies—seamlessly connecting online content with immersive offline experiences.Bringing culture to life and transforming travel into a new form of interactive, engaging exploration.
tourism_page.intro_p1: When cultural heritage meets digital innovation, and travel experiences are enhanced by intelligent technologies, a new era of cultural exploration begins.
tourism_page.intro_p2: With “Technology + Culture & Tourism” at the core, we integrate online and offline scenarios to deliver end-to-end solutions—combining immersive experiences, digital content distribution, and creative production.
tourism_page.intro_p3: Bringing cultural assets to life and redefining the way people experience travel.
tourism_page.m1_desc: Multi-physics coupling algorithm / High-precision 3D reconstruction / Millimeter-level reproduction
tourism_page.m3_desc: Real-time interactive systems enabling dynamic user engagement across digital and physical environments.
tourism_page.m4_desc: Multi-modal perception (visual, auditory, tactile) and spatial computing
tourism_page.cat_online_desc: Digital content designed for creation, distribution, and interaction across online platforms—forming the foundation of immersive digital experiences and virtual engagement.
tourism_page.case_on_1_desc: A fully immersive digital recreation of Nanxun Ancient Town, enabling users to explore its cultural heritage and architectural beauty in a virtual environment.By integrating a metaverse-based commerce model with physical retail, the platform allows users to navigate virtual stores through avatars—experiencing everything from virtual try-ons to digital purchases in a 24/7 online environment.
tourism_page.case_on_2_desc: Built with not only traditional offline shopping scenes but also virtual roaming and virtual product displays, breaking space constraints to provide 24/7 shopping services.
tourism_page.case_on_3_title: Guijiu Group - 17 Light Years Metaverse - Private Domain Commercial Metaverse
tourism_page.case_on_3_desc: Guided by QR codes, users can transparently enter the metaverse world as digital humans and guests. Interacting with friends, experiencing brand stories, and participating in various fun activities.
tourism_page.case_on_4_desc: A virtual concert experience powered by VR and blockchain technologies, enabling users to attend as digital avatars, interact with other fans, and collect exclusive NFT assets—delivering a new level of immersion and engagement.
tourism_page.case_on_5_title: Dinosaur Theme Park Online Digital Metaverse
tourism_page.case_on_5_desc: Relying on rich dinosaur cultural resources, building a 'Geek Village' digital tourism new city, combining digital technology and the metaverse to build an immersive Cretaceous experience.
tourism_page.case_on_6_desc: 3D display of artwork in a 720-degree virtual space, with public interactive reviews and a derivative mall providing rich art derivative transactions.
tourism_page.cat_offline_desc: Digital content embedded within physical environments, delivered through interactive devices to enable real-time, on-site immersive experiences.
tourism_page.case_off_1_desc: An immersive VR cultural tourism project that recreates the historical and natural landscapes of Jianmen Pass.By leveraging VR and simulation technologies, users can transcend time and space to experience historical events, cultural narratives, and scenic environments in an interactive way.
tourism_page.case_off_2_title: VR Town - VR Roaming Huangshan + AR Museum
tourism_page.case_off_2_desc: A government-led digital tourism initiative integrating VR exploration and AR-enhanced museum experiences.Visitors engage with Huangshan’s cultural heritage through interactive, game-like environments while gaining educational insights through augmented reality.
tourism_page.case_off_3_title: Digital Upgrade of Aerospace Science and Technology Museum
tourism_page.case_off_3_desc: A comprehensive digital upgrade of an aerospace science museum, featuring multiple themed exhibition zones that showcase decades of aerospace development.Through immersive technologies, the project delivers an integrated experience combining education, interaction, and exploration.
tourism_page.case_off_4_title: Wulong Fairy Mountain Tree New Tech Empowered Digital Ecology
tourism_page.case_off_4_desc: The first micro-terrain digital ecological exploration experience center in China, dedicated to building the first metaverse immersive cultural and commercial new holy land in China.
tourism_page.case_off_5_desc: Creating a lifelike underwater world, leading audiences into an ocean ecological environment full of life. The marine landscape includes colorful coral reefs, swimming turtles, and schools of fish.
tourism_page.case_off_6_title: Sanya Xintou - VR Experience Pavilion - Digital Micro Giant
tourism_page.case_off_6_desc: A leading large-space multiplayer interactive VR theme park in China, combining scenic spot culture with multiple VR interactive entertainment products.
tourism_page.case_off_7_title: Sanya Xintou - VR Experience Pavilion - Luobi Cave
tourism_page.case_off_7_desc: Providing content production for the core VR theme park created by Sanya Xintou, focusing on presenting Sanya's Luobi Cave culture using advanced all-in-one VR tech.
tourism_page.case_off_8_desc: Centered on immersive digital content, creating a fascinating virtual underwater world, allowing tourists to travel back to the spectacular landscape of the ancient Jurassic period.
tourism_page.case_off_9_desc: A leading large-space, immersive, multiplayer mobile VR offline experience in China. A highly free virtual world where players can role-play like in an RPG.
tourism_page.case_off_10_desc: Smart AR navigation system, providing physical interaction information, commercial recommendations, and dynamic route planning through positioning fusion tech.
tourism_page.case_off_11_title: Cultural Museum Navigation and Explanation Interaction
tourism_page.case_off_11_desc: 3D virtual tour guide providing anthropomorphic interactive answers and directions. Combined with high-precision dynamic route guidance and cultural relic recognition tech.
tourism_page.cat_shoot_desc: Creative video production that transforms visual storytelling into high-impact digital content—serving as the foundation for brand communication and immersive media experiences.
tourism_page.case_sh_1_title: Neta Auto - AR Live Virtual Online Launch
tourism_page.case_sh_1_desc: A virtual product launch powered by AR and real-time rendering technologies, seamlessly integrating physical vehicle footage with a digitally constructed stage—showcasing product features through dynamic visual storytelling.
tourism_page.case_sh_2_desc: 360° VR panoramic Mobile Suit Girl reload launch display, relying on advanced VR tech to create a realistic interstellar world for players.
tourism_page.case_sh_3_desc: On-site AR special effects display vehicle wind resistance effects, showing aerodynamic performance and stability in dynamic scenes, demonstrating technical strength.
tourism_page.case_sh_4_title: Jackson Yee 18th Birthday - Dancing with Digital Human 'Red Bean'
tourism_page.case_sh_4_desc: A live performance integrating real-time motion capture and digital human technology, enabling seamless interaction between the performer and a virtual character—creating a groundbreaking fusion of reality and digital performance.
tourism_page.cta_title: Start Your Journey in Digital Culture & Tourism
tourism_page.cta_desc: Partner with us to create next-generation immersive cultural and tourism experiences.

entertainment_page.hero_desc: Blending virtual interaction with real-world movement, POONG! creates a new generation of immersive multiplayer experiences.With intuitive gameplay and dynamic mechanics, it delivers a social, active, and highly engaging entertainment experience for everyone.
entertainment_page.intro_p1: When Mixed Reality meets playful creativity, and physical movement merges with social interaction, a new form of entertainment emerges.
entertainment_page.intro_p2: Built around “MR + Offline + IP”, POONG! creates an ecosystem that combines immersive gameplay, social connection, and light physical activity.
entertainment_page.intro_p3: Redefining offline entertainment—bringing movement, energy, and joy into every experience while unlocking new opportunities for business partners.
entertainment_page.easy_desc: No bulky equipment required—just put on an MR headset and jump straight into the action.Use natural gestures to launch attacks and dodge in real time.Quick to learn and instantly engaging, it’s designed for everyone—from families to trend-driven players.
entertainment_page.battle_sub: Gesture-based attacks, real-time movement, and dynamic power-ups create an ever-changing battlefield.
entertainment_page.battle_desc: Fast-paced matches designed for high-energy gameplay—each round lasts just 2 minutes, combining fitness and entertainment in one seamless experience.
entertainment_page.eco_l1: Instantly match with players via mini-apps, track real-time rankings, and engage through social interactions.
entertainment_page.eco_l2: Live match streaming on large screens with full online broadcasting support—turning every game into a social highlight.
entertainment_page.eco_l3: Seasonal competitions with exclusive rewards for top players, driving long-term engagement.
entertainment_page.sol_sub: Low Investment, Fast Deployment, Rapid ROI
entertainment_page.coop_1_desc:
Zero-cost upgrade for existing VR stores
Introducing POONG! content ecosystem
entertainment_page.coop_2_desc:
Full set of standardized operation system output
Nanny-style opening guidance
entertainment_page.coop_3_desc:
Exclusive regional protection
Enjoy high rewards for store expansion and revenue sharing
entertainment_page.ip_desc:
POONG! features an original IP universe filled with unique “Bubble Friends”—each with distinctive personalities ranging from playful and quirky to bold and energetic.
These characters become both in-game companions and iconic figures in the physical merchandise ecosystem.
entertainment_page.deriv_desc: Developed a full range of peripheral products based on IP including limited edition figures, blind boxes, action figures, keychains, and trendy stickers.
entertainment_page.promo_desc: Pico Enterprise MR Headset*4 | Pico Exclusive Power Bank*4 | PC Server*1 Router*1 | 65-inch Projector*1 | Cashier POS*1 | Speaker*1
entertainment_page.shop1_desc: No backpack · No vest · Zero restraint
entertainment_page.shop2_desc: Team Competitive / Battle Royale / Group Monster Fighting
entertainment_page.cta_main: Join POONG! Build the Future of Entertainment
entertainment_page.cta_desc: Make movement more fun and entertainment more active.

contact_page.hero_desc: We look forward to exploring new possibilities with you. Reach out and let's connect.
contact_page.bj_add: Room 1302, Block F, Fuhua Building, No.8 Chaoyangmen North Street, Dongcheng District, Beijing
